title: Master v0.2.2 Build Folder Auto Publish
notes:
Adds a Build From Update Folder workflow so Master can build update folders, fill the publish form, select the built EXE, and optionally auto-publish to GitHub.

Changes:
- Adds Choose Update Folder button
- Adds Build + Fill Publish Form button
- Adds Build + Auto Publish button
- Adds build log output in Master
- Adds source-folder detection
- Adds package.json metadata parsing
- Adds README release info parsing
- Adds automatic built EXE detection
- Keeps Paste Update Info Autofill from v0.2.1
